about.en: Upbit is a centralized cryptocurrency exchange operated by Dunamu and known for its Korean won markets. It offers spot trading and regional crypto exchange services.
about.es: Upbit es un exchange centralizado de criptomonedas operado por Dunamu y conocido por sus mercados en won coreano. Ofrece trading spot y servicios regionales de exchange cripto.
about.ca: Upbit es un exchange centralitzat de criptomonedes operat per Dunamu i conegut pels seus mercats en won corea. Ofereix trading spot i serveis regionals d'exchange cripto.
